info.title: CodePen
info.description: A showcase of creative code snippets and experiments.

info.title: Apptitude
info.description: An app development hackathon where ideas transform into reality through code and design.

info.title: Code2Create
info.description: Our flagship hackathon bringing together creative minds to solve real-world problems.

info.title: Codart
info.description: A unique blend of coding and art, challenging participants to create visual masterpieces with code.

info.title: Code Plus Plus
info.description: An introductory coding event designed to help beginners take their first steps in programming.

info.title: Codex Cryptum
info.description: A mystery-solving coding event where cryptography meets algorithmic challenges.

info.title: Cryptic Hunt
info.description: An online treasure hunt that tests your logic, lateral thinking, and decoding skills.

info.title: Forktober Fest
info.description: A month-long celebration of open source, encouraging contributions and community collaboration.

info.title: inspiHer
info.description: An event dedicated to empowering women in technology through talks, workshops, and mentorship.

info.title: The Neural Hack
info.description: A deep dive into AI and Machine Learning, challenging participants to build intelligent solutions.

info.title: Reverse Coding
info.description: A competitive coding event where you figure out the logic from test cases and write the code.

info.title: The Tiny Hack
info.description: A fast-paced mini hackathon focusing on quick prototyping and efficient problem solving.
